nasb.text: and from Bamoth to the valley that is in the land of Moab, at the top of Pisgah which overlooks the wasteland.

esv.text: and from Bamoth to the valley lying in the region of Moab by the top of Pisgah that looks down on the desert.

cnv.text: 從巴末到摩押地的谷，又到了俯瞰荒野的毘斯迦山頂。

ccb.text: 从巴末前往摩押的谷地，从那里的毗斯迦山顶可以俯视旷野。
